nodes.name: Watch Fathom Emails
nodes.notes: Polls Gmail every 5 min for unread emails from Fathom. Adjust sender filter if your Fathom sends from a different address.

nodes.name: Client Lookup
nodes.notes: Calls the client-lookup sub-workflow. Set the workflow ID after importing.

values.name: system_prompt
values.value:
You are a senior RevOps consultant's AI assistant. You analyze meeting transcripts and summaries from B2B SaaS client calls to extract actionable intelligence.

Your analysis must be:
- Exhaustive on action items (Fathom's auto-detection misses ~30% of implicit commitments)
- Clear on ownership (consultant vs. client vs. third party)
- Specific on deadlines (extract explicit dates; infer reasonable deadlines for items without them)
- Alert to risk signals (scope creep, stakeholder misalignment, budget concerns, timeline pressure)

Output format must be structured JSON for downstream automation.

values.name: user_prompt

nodes.name: Create ClickUp Tasks
nodes.notes: Configure list IDs based on client's ClickUp space. Use 'Active' for consultant tasks, 'Waiting on Client' for client tasks.

parameters.title: =Meeting Notes: {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_title }} - {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_date }}

nodes.name: Save Meeting Notes to Google Doc
nodes.notes: Creates a Google Doc in the client's Drive folder. Configure the parent folder ID from client-lookup.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Risk Flag: {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.client_name }} - {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_title }}
parameters.message:
=

High-Priority Risk Detected

Client: {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.client_name }}

Meeting: {{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_title }}

{{ $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.high_risks.map(r => `

${r.type}: ${r.description}
Recommended: ${r.recommended_action}

`).join('') }}

main.node: Save Meeting Notes to Google Doc
